name: DARKRUNNER
description: A thrilling 2D platformer game built with Java Swing, featuring pixel art and dynamic gameplay.
cardDescription: A 2D platformer to explore OOP with Java.

sections.title: What is DARKRUNNER?
paragraphs: DARKRUNNER is an exciting 2D platformer game built using Java Swing, designed to explore object-oriented programming and graphical user interfaces. Players navigate through a fast-paced environment filled with dynamic obstacles, all rendered in a nostalgic pixel art style.

The game features an endless scrolling background, smooth animations, and the forever classic 'Strobe' by deadmau5 to enhance the immersive experience. With responsive controls, a scaling difficulty system, and real-time collision detection, DARKRUNNER offers a thrilling challenge for players of all levels.

items.name: Dynamic Obstacles
items.description: Randomly generated ground and aerial threats.

items.name: Pixel Art Style
items.description: Retro-styled visuals for an immersive experience.

items.name: Health System
items.description: Three health points with real-time visual updates.

items.name: Background Music
items.description: Custom soundtrack for an engaging experience.

items.name: Casual Gaming
items.description: Enjoy fast-paced fun in V1 mode.

items.name: Challenge Seekers
items.description: Tackle tougher obstacles in V2 mode.

items.name: Learning Java
items.description: Study OOP and Swing through game dev.

sections.title: Technology & Architecture
paragraphs: DARKRUNNER is built entirely with Java Swing, leveraging its graphical interface capabilities to create a responsive 2D platformer. A custom timer mechanism ensures smooth animations and real-time gameplay updates, while collision detection handles player-obstacle interactions.

The game incorporates pixel art assets and an endless scrolling background for visual immersion, paired with Java's audio systems for high-quality sound playback. The architecture emphasizes object-oriented principles, making it a great example for learning Java GUI development.

sections.title: Get Started
paragraphs: DARKRUNNER is a fun and challenging 2D platformer that brings retro gaming to life. Check out the project on GitHub to play, contribute, or learn more about Java Swing game development.
